zh.Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll於1445年4月出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏姆雕時，她的父親George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes28歲，母親Christina Halyburton30歲。她於1485年10月14日與William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll在蘇格蘭費伏林多雷斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1511年8月15日在英國蘇格蘭享年66歲。

zh-hans.Leslie, Fife, Scotland: 英国苏格兰費伏萊斯利
zh-hans.Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll于1445年4月出生在英国苏格兰費伏姆雕时，她的父亲George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes28岁，母亲Christina Halyburton30岁。她于1485年10月14日与William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll在苏格兰費伏林多雷斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1511年8月15日在英国苏格兰享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll was born in April 1445, in Moonzie, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes, was 28 and her mother, Christina Halyburton, was 30. She married William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll on 14 October 1485, in Lindores, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 15 August 1511, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll est née en avril 1445, à Moonzie, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Christina Halyburton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll le 14 octobre 1485, à Lindores, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1511, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll im April 1445 in Moonzie, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes 28 und ihre Mutter Christina Halyburton 30. Sie hat am 14. Oktober 1485 in Lindores, Fife, Scotland William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. August 1511 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll è nata il nel aprile 1445 nel Moonzie, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Christina Halyburton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll il 14 ottobre 1485, nel Lindores, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 15 agosto 1511, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Errollが1445年4月にイギリススコットランドフィフムーンズイで生まれた時，父George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothesは28歳，母Christina Halyburtonは30歳であった。1485年10月14日にスコットランドフィフリンドアスでWilliam Hay 3rd Earl of Errollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1511年8月15日にイギリススコットランドで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll(이)가 1445년 4월 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 무지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christina Halyburton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1485년 10월 14일 스컷랜드 피프 린도어스에서 William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1511년 8월 15일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll nasceu em abril de 1445, em Moonzie, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Christina Halyburton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll em 14 de outubro de 1485, em Lindores, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1511, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll родилась апрель 1445 г. в местности мунзи, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina Halyburton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll 14 октября 1485 г. в местности линдоресь, фиф, Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 августа 1511 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Leslie Countess of Erroll nació en abril de 1445, en Moonzie, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, George Leslie 1st Earl of Rothes, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Christina Halyburton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con William Hay 3rd Earl of Erroll el 14 de octubre de 1485, en Lindores, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1511, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
